arts.ttl: Arsenal & Liverpool dealt major blow in pursuit of Premier League wonderkid
arts.sum: Adam Wharton has no plans to leave Crystal Palace this January despite growing interest from Premier League giants, according to reports. Wharton proved a revelation in the second half of last season following his January move from Blackburn Rovers. Unhappy Oliver Glasner informs the press of January plans at Crystal Palace! arts.ttl: Roy Keane and Ian Wright fume after Newcastle were controversially denied a penalty following Virgil van Dijk's shoulder charge to the face of Anthony Gordon
arts.sum: Ian Wright and Roy Keane were both in agreement that Newcastle were denied a clear penalty in the first half of their Premier League clash with Liverpool on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Former Liverpool and Chelsea manager Rafael Benitez reveals he would 'consider' shock national team job... nine months on from being sacked by LaLiga club
arts.sum: Benitez, 64, who has previously managed Liverpool , Chelsea , Newcastle and Everton in England 's top-flight, has been away from the dugout since he was sacked by Celta Vigo.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Alexis Mac Allister suspended for Merseyside derby against Everton
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister was given his fifth yellow card of the season against Newcastle United, therefore earning himself a suspension for Saturday's meeting with rivals Everton

arts.ttl: Man United looking to upset Liverpool with €50m move for Bundesliga talent
arts.sum: Man United have joined the race for Eintracht Frankfurt star Hugo Larsson who has been linked with a move away from the Bundesliga club in recent weeks. arts.ttl: Liverpool Draw Up Shortlist of Trent Alexander-Arnold Replacements
arts.sum: The Reds are preparing for a life without the full-back

arts.ttl: Federico Chiesa quietly makes Liverpool return with goal as Arne Slot handed another injury boost
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa starts for Liverpool under-21s in the Premier League international cup as the senior side face Newcastle United at St James' Park

arts.ttl: Liverpool given important Man City 115 charges trial update as verdict timeline 'established'
arts.sum: Premier League news as Manchester City's high-profile case over 115 alleged financial breaches enters its closing statements

arts.ttl: Exclusive: £16.6m star now decides to snub Manchester City, Tottenham and Liverpool in favour of new contract
Man City, Liverpool 'on red alert' as Martin Zubimendi 'makes major transfer decision'
arts.sum: Spain international Martin Zubimendi is reportedly open to leaving Real Sociedad next summer amid interest from Manchester City and Liverpool.
